targets.rawSql:
WITH parsed_alerts AS (
    SELECT
        alert_timestamp,
        src_ip,
        suspicious_batch_id,
        overall_score,
        arrayStringConcat(arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', arrayMap(entry -> multiIf(
            substring(entry, 1, 1) = '"', replaceRegexpAll(entry, '^"|"$', ''),
            JSONHas(entry, 'domain_name'), JSONExtractString(entry, 'domain_name'),
            entry
        ), arrayFlatten(arrayMap(item -> if(substring(item, 1, 1) = '[', JSONExtractArrayRaw(item), [item]), JSONExtractArrayRaw(domain_names)))))), ', ') AS domains,
        arrayStringConcat(arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', arrayMap(warning -> JSONExtractString(warning, 'name'), JSONExtractArrayRaw(result)))), ', ') AS detector_names,
        result
    FROM alerts
    WHERE alert_timestamp >= $__fromTime
      AND alert_timestamp <= $__toTime
)
SELECT
    alert_timestamp AS "Time",
    src_ip AS "Client IP address",
    suspicious_batch_id AS "Suspicious batch ID",
    round(overall_score, 4) AS "Score",
    detector_names AS "Detectors",
    domains AS "Domains"
FROM parsed_alerts
WHERE ('${IpFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(src_ip, '${IpFilter}') > 0)
  AND ('${DomainFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(domains, '${DomainFilter}') > 0)
  AND ('${BatchFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(toString(suspicious_batch_id), '${BatchFilter}') > 0)
  AND ('${DetectorFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(detector_names, '${DetectorFilter}') > 0)
ORDER BY alert_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500;

WITH parsed_alerts AS (
    SELECT
        alert_timestamp,
        src_ip,
        suspicious_batch_id,
        overall_score,
        arrayStringConcat(arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', arrayMap(entry -> multiIf(
            substring(entry, 1, 1) = '"', replaceRegexpAll(entry, '^"|"$', ''),
            JSONHas(entry, 'domain_name'), JSONExtractString(entry, 'domain_name'),
            entry
        ), arrayFlatten(arrayMap(item -> if(substring(item, 1, 1) = '[', JSONExtractArrayRaw(item), [item]), JSONExtractArrayRaw(domain_names)))))), ', ') AS domains,
        result
    FROM alerts
    WHERE alert_timestamp >= $__fromTime
      AND alert_timestamp <= $__toTime
), detector_outputs AS (
    SELECT
        alert_timestamp,
        src_ip,
        suspicious_batch_id,
        domains,
        warning,
        multiIf(
            JSONExtractString(warning, 'detector_name') != '', JSONExtractString(warning, 'detector_name'),
            JSONExtractString(warning, 'name') != '', JSONExtractString(warning, 'name'),
            ''
        ) AS detector_name,
        multiIf(
            JSONHas(warning, 'score'), JSONExtractFloat(warning, 'score'),
            JSONHas(warning, 'probability'), JSONExtractFloat(warning, 'probability'),
            0
        ) AS score,
        JSONExtractString(warning, 'predicted_class') AS predicted_class,
        multiIf(
            JSONHas(warning, 'attributes'), JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'attributes'),
            JSONHas(warning, 'class_probabilities'), JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'class_probabilities'),
            ''
        ) AS detector_class_output,
        multiIf(
            JSONHas(warning, 'domains'), JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'domains'),
            JSONHas(warning, 'domain_names'), JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'domain_names'),
            ''
        ) AS detector_domains,
        multiIf(JSONHas(warning, 'logline_ids'), JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'logline_ids'), '') AS logline_ids,
        multiIf(JSONHas(warning, 'server_message_ids'), JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'server_message_ids'), '') AS server_message_ids,
        JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'request') AS request_raw,
        multiIf(JSONHas(warning, 'raw_detector_output'), JSONExtractRaw(warning, 'raw_detector_output'), warning) AS raw_detector_output
    FROM parsed_alerts
    ARRAY JOIN JSONExtractArrayRaw(result) AS warning
)
SELECT
    alert_timestamp AS "Time",
    src_ip AS "Client IP address",
    suspicious_batch_id AS "Suspicious batch ID",
    detector_name AS "Detector",
    round(score, 4) AS "Score",
    predicted_class AS "Predicted class",
    detector_class_output AS "Class output",
    detector_domains AS "Detector domains",
    logline_ids AS "Logline IDs",
    server_message_ids AS "Server message IDs",
    request_raw AS "Raw request/window",
    raw_detector_output AS "Raw detector output"
FROM detector_outputs
WHERE ('${IpFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(src_ip, '${IpFilter}') > 0)
  AND ('${DomainFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(concat(domains, ' ', detector_domains, ' ', request_raw), '${DomainFilter}') > 0)
  AND ('${BatchFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(toString(suspicious_batch_id), '${BatchFilter}') > 0)
  AND ('${DetectorFilter}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(detector_name, '${DetectorFilter}') > 0)
ORDER BY alert_timestamp DESC, score DESC
LIMIT 500;
